name: IR Obstacle Avoidance Sensor (TCRT5000)

pins.out: Digital Output (Active LOW — reads 0 when obstacle detected)

indicator_leds.signal_led: Lights when obstacle is detected (output goes LOW)

description: 3-pin IR proximity sensor module. Pins left-to-right: OUT, GND, VCC. Output is Active LOW (0V when obstacle detected, 5V when clear). Has onboard potentiometer to adjust sensitivity range.
